headline: Arista Networks (ANET) Launches AI Driven Zero Trust Security For Branch Offices
summary: Arista Networks (NYSE:ANET) has introduced an AI-driven zero trust Edge Threat Management platform for VeloCloud SD-WAN. The new solution targets branch office security by unifying multiple security tools into a single SD-WAN edge platform. The launch reflects Arista Networks' push beyond data center and AI infrastructure into the branch security segment. Arista Networks enters this product launch with its stock trading at $169.35 and a very large 5 year return of about 7x. The shares are...

headline: Arista Networks Introduces AI-Driven Zero Trust Branch
summary: SANTA CLARA, Calif., July 21, 2026--Arista Networks (NYSE: ANET), a leader in networking for cloud and artificial intelligence (AI) fabrics, today announced the launch of its new AI-driven Edge Threat Management (ETM) for VeloCloud SD-WAN, delivering integrated zero trust security for enterprise branch offices. Customers can leverage this integration to simplify the branch, collapsing multiple disparate boxes into a single unified secure SD-WAN edge platform.
